active.name: fetch-pr
active.description: Fetches the latest open PR diff from a GitHub repo via the API

active.name: code-reviewer
active.description: Reviews a fetched PR diff for bugs, security issues, and style problems

active.name: report-writer
active.description: Writes a structured markdown review report and optionally posts it as a GitHub PR comment

active.name: skill-creator
active.description: Drafts a new skill file when the agent encounters a task with no matching skill

active.name: dependency-checker
active.description: Scans dependency files for outdated packages, version changes, and known vulnerable packages

active.name: test-coverage-checker
active.description: Checks whether new code added in a PR has corresponding test coverage

active.name: pr-summary-writer
active.description: Writes a plain English summary of what a PR does and whether it is ready to merge

active.name: security-scanner
active.description: Deep security scan for secrets, injection vulnerabilities, and OWASP issues

active.name: code-complexity-analyzer
active.description: Flags functions that are too long, too nested, or too complex

active.name: documentation-checker
active.description: Checks new functions and classes for missing docstrings, JSDoc, and inline comments

active.name: performance-reviewer
active.description: Spots common performance anti-patterns including N+1 queries, memory leaks, and inefficient loops

active.name: commit-message-reviewer
active.description: Reviews commit messages against conventional commits format for clarity and consistency

active.name: changelog-updater
active.description: Generates a CHANGELOG.md entry for a PR in Keep a Changelog format

active.name: docker-reviewer
active.description: Reviews Dockerfile and docker-compose changes for security issues and best practices
